question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. Enter your registered email address, and we will send you a password reset link. Follow the instructions in the email to set up a new password.

question: How can I get my money back or request a refund?
answer: Refunds are processed within 5 business days of approval. To request a refund, please contact our support team through the support portal with your order details. We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all subscription plans.

question: How do I create a new account?
answer: You can create a new account by clicking the 'Sign Up' or 'Register' button on the top right corner of the homepage. Enter your name, email address, and create a password, then follow the confirmation prompt in your email to activate your account.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can contact our customer support team via email at support@aurachat.com, through our live chat widget on the website, or by submitting a ticket on our Help Center page. We are available 24/7 to assist you.

question: How do I cancel my active subscription?
answer: To cancel your active subscription, go to your Account Settings, click on the 'Billing & Subscriptions' tab, and select 'Cancel Subscription'. Your premium features will remain active until the end of your current billing period.

question: What pricing plans do you offer?
answer: We offer three pricing tiers: a Free Plan with basic chatbot capabilities, a Pro Plan at $19/month for unlimited custom models, and an Enterprise Plan with dedicated support and custom integrations. You can view all details on our pricing page.

question: Is my chat data and personal information secure?
answer: Yes, absolutely. We use industry-standard AES-256 encryption for data at rest and SSL/TLS protocols for data in transit. We never sell your personal information or chat logs to third parties.

question: How do I change my account settings or personal details?
answer: To update your account settings or personal details, log in and navigate to the 'Account Settings' page by clicking on your profile avatar in the upper right. From there, you can change your display name, update your contact email, and manage security settings.
